highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.1 fixes Metal disposal and canvas hosting on iOS, tvOS and Mac Catalyst.

bullets.detail: Adds a PostScriptName property to SKTypeface, matching what Skia already exposes.

bullets.lead: Metal disposal on iOS 15 and Mac Catalyst
bullets.detail: Disposing a GRContext on the Metal backend no longer crashes, SKMetalView is no longer initialised twice, and the iOS 15 Metal hotfix is applied.
SKXamlCanvas is no longer forced opaque on Mac Catalyst, matching iOS behaviour.
SKAutoCanvasRestore no longer crashes on Dispose when the canvas was already disposed.
Corrects UTC DateTime conversion in the type helpers.

contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Metal GRContext disposal test, SKMetalView single-init fix, and UTC DateTime conversion fix.
contributor_summaries.taublast: iOS 15 Metal hotfix and the SKAutoCanvasRestore double-dispose guard.
contributor_summaries.pjcollins: Added CI triggers for primary branches on the native pipeline.
contributor_summaries.spouliot: Fixed SKXamlCanvas being forced opaque on Mac Catalyst.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 cut the 3.119.1 line with the Metal disposal fixes, the Mac Catalyst SKXamlCanvas fix and the new PostScriptName property.
